positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic, soaring eagle perched on a stylized geometric monolith, casting strong, dramatic shadows. The artwork should utilize a bold, modern graphic novel aesthetic with sharp lines and deep contrast, reminiscent of linocut prints mixed with neo-tribal patterns. Dominant color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, and stark white. The composition should be centralized, highly symmetrical, and easily visible when printed on fabric. Incorporate abstract elements like swirling wind patterns and simplified celestial motifs in the background. Cinematic, vector art, highly detailed illustration, clean silhouettes, poster quality, art deco influence.
